# Test Fixtures

This directory contains sample files for testing the Document Assembly Tool.

- `sample_data.docx`  Word table with key-value pairs.
- `sample_data.csv`  CSV file with header and one data row.
- `sample_data.json`  JSON object with the same fields.
- `sample_template.docx`  Template with placeholders `{{client_name}}`, `{{project_title}}`, `{{budget}}`.

These files are generated by running `python tests/generate_fixtures.py`.
